studyName: OPPERA prospective cohort study of first-onset TMJD

tables.description: RDC (Research Diagnostic Criteria) - The dataset includes data of pain self-assessment reports (pain in different muscles of e.g. jaw, head, neck, including headache, yes/no), measured parameters of vertical range of mandibular motion (mm), palpation tenderness and thresholds (following one or two pounds of digital palpation pressure) at e.g. jaw, neck, shoulder muscles, ribs, lateral epicondyle, knee, and TMJ sounds.
